arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains Ben White absence from Arsenal XI as star makes debut vs Man City
arts.sum: There was only a place among the subsitutes for Ben White as Riccardo Calafiori earns his first Arsenal start in the Premier League against Manchester City

arts.ttl: Man City boss Guardiola claims rivals want club to "disappear" over 115 charges
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola claims the footballing world wants the club to "disappear" as the hearing into their 115 financial charges begins.

arts.ttl: Why Ben White is not starting for Arsenal vs Man City as Kevin De Bruyne misses out
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Ben White was only passed fit enough to make the bench for the Premier League clash at Manchester City after his Champions League exertions this week

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Man City confirmed line-ups as Mikel Arteta and Pep Guardiola make big calls
arts.sum: Arsenal have a chance to go top of the Premier League table with a win away to Manchester City, and Mikel Arteta and counterpart Pep Guardiola have both tweaked their starting XIs

arts.ttl: Man City should fear the visit of Arsenal today in Premier League title clash
arts.sum: Arsenal took four points from their two games with City last season - a 1-0 win at the Emirates followed by a 0-0 draw at the Etihad. Arteta's outfit have won an incredible ten of their last 11 Premier League away games - scoring 31 goals on the road in 2024 with nine clean sheets.

arts.ttl: Arsenal target looks back on failed summer transfer
arts.sum: "I was pretty calm throughout the transfer window, isolated, because I was at the Olympic Games," Garcia told the Spanish press, reliving the brief saga. Arsenal summer transfer target Joan Garcia has revealed he didn't allow himself to be distracted by speculation about his future, deliberately keeping himself "isolated" from it.

arts.ttl: Why Kevin De Bruyne is not in Man City squad vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Kevin De Bruyne was not named in Pep Guardiola's selection for the Premier League game with Arsenal

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola vs Mikel Arteta – The head-to-head record
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola and Mikel Arteta pit their wits against each other once again this weekend, as Manchester City take on Arsenal in the Premier League. Friends who have become rivals, Arteta began his coaching career on Guardiola’s staff at Manchester City before leaving to take charge of Arsenal in December 2019. arts.ttl: Man City and Arsenal combined XI: The Gunners' centre back partnership stands strong and there's a place for both Rodri and Declan Rice - but who gets the nod behind Erling Haaland?
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola is still without long-term absentee Oscar Bobb, while Nathan Ake suffered a thigh injury while on international duty and Kevin De Bruyne remains a doubt.

arts.ttl: 'Everyone knows': Emile Smith Rowe now shares how he's truly feeling after leaving Arsenal for Fulham
arts.sum: Emile Smith Rowe finally moved on from Arsenal this summer after a torrid few seasons and he looks like he’s approaching his best again in...
